subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Divine Threshold! It is said that among the painters of the world, in Iran [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی گویند که در بین نقاشان عالم در ایران
subcodes.subjects: @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @creativity in art, @firmness in the Covenant
